OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope defines the set of entity types that the enrichment connector is allowed to process.

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_INTELLIGENCE_URL.description: The URL of the ReversingLabs Spectra Intelligence service.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_INTELLIGENCE_USERN.description: Username used to authenticate requests to the ReversingLabs Spectra Intelligence service.

REVERSINGLABS_SPECTRA_INTELLIGENCE_PASSW.description: Password used to authenticate requests to the ReversingLabs Spectra Intelligence service.

REVERSINGLABS_MAX_TLP.description: Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) level to apply on objects imported into OpenCTI.

REVERSINGLABS_SANDBOX_OS.description: The operating system platform for sandbox dynamic analysis.

REVERSINGLABS_SANDBOX_INTERNET_SIM.description: Enables or disables internet simulation in the sandbox environment.

REVERSINGLABS_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: Enables or disables creation of indicators from analysis results.

REVERSINGLABS_POLL_INTERVAL.description: Interval in seconds between polling for analysis results (minimum 250).
